diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,157 @@
+# Routing Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Purpose: Main Hono router entry point that exports Hono class with default router configuration
+- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, HonoOptions, Env, Schema, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter
+- Simple note: 34 lines total. Default constructs SmartRouter with RegExpRouter and TrieRouter fallbacks.
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Purpose: Core Hono framework base class with route registration and request handling logic
+- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, HonoOptions, GetPath, Env, Context, Router, METHODS, METHOD_NAME_ALL, compose, router, basePath, route, mount, onError, notFound, fetch, request, fire, addRoute, dispatch, error, errorHandler, strict, options, composed handler, matchResult, final, response
+- Simple note: 545 lines total. Manages routing, middleware composition, error handling, and HTTP method delegation.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: PatternRouter module index file exposing the router class
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter
+- Simple note: 6 lines total. Simple index redirect to router.ts implementation.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Pattern-based routing using compiled regex patterns for path matching
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, Route, emptyParams, add, match, RegExp, endsWithWildcard, splitByWildcard, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, splitPathRe
+- Simple note: 60 lines total. Compiles routes into regex and matches against incoming paths with parameter extraction.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: LinearRouter module index file exposing the router class
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter
+- Simple note: 6 lines total. Simple index redirect to router.ts implementation.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Linear path-based routing with sequential iteration and pattern matching
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, ROUTES_LOOP, add, match, checkOptionalParameter, splitPathRe, splitByStarRe, RegExpMatchArrayWithIndices, ROUTES_LOOP label, method, routes, params, star match, label match, wildcard match, handler, path, index, value, position, lastIndex, continue
+- Simple note: 144 lines total. Linearly iterates routes checking all match conditions, uses loops for star and label pattern matching.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: RegExpRouter module index exposing router and PreparedRegExpRouter classes
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams, matcher, node, trie
+- Simple note: 7 lines total. Exports main router class plus prepared/serialized version for production use.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: RegExpRouter implementation with Trie-based preprocessing and runtime matching
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, buildWildcardRegExp, clearWildcardRegExpCache, buildMatcherFromPreprocessedRoutes, Trie, match, paramAssoc, handlerData, routes, staticMap, middleware, indexReplacementMap, paramReplacementMap, pathError, captureIndex, RegExp, insert, search, findMiddleware, ParamAssocArray, Node, match
+- Simple note: 252 lines total. Uses Trie to preprocess routes into regex, builds matcher with handler data and static path mapping, supports middleware and method handling.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+- Purpose: Matcher interface for compiled regex router containing regex, handler data, and static map
+- Names noticed: Matcher, MatcherMap, staticMatch, match, emptyParam, paramIndexMap, ParamIndexMap, emptyParam, Result, HandlerData, StaticMap, METHOD_NAME_ALL, index, indexOf
+- Simple note: 33 lines total. Three-tuple matcher (regex, handlers, static map), uses hash map for static path lookups, fallback to regex for dynamic paths.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+- Purpose: PreparedRegExpRouter for hot-swappable router with serialized initialization
+- Names noticed: PreparedRegExpRouter, RelocateMap, matchers, add, addWildcard, addPath, match, METHOD_NAME_ALL, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams, RegExpRouter, buildAllMatchers, buildAndExportAllMatchers, matchers, relocateMap, JSON.stringify, ##, replace
+- Simple note: 165 lines total. Wraps RegExpRouter with pre-built matchers for fast startup, supports serialization as literal array with embedded regex.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Trie Node class for hierarchical route tree with regex generation
+- Names noticed: Node, Context, varIndex, children, patterns, insert, buildRegExpStr, label, wildcard, token, regexpStr, regex, symbol PATH_ERROR, compareKey, sort order, onlyWildcard, tailWildcard, regExpMetaChars, set
+- Simple note: 162 lines total. Tree of regex patterns, uses varIndex for capturing groups, builds combined regex string from child keys with @varIndex markers.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+- Purpose: Trie class for building and inserting route patterns into tree structure
+- Names mentioned: Node, Context, ParamAssocArray, insert, group, mark, token, RegExp, buildRegExp, captureIndex, ReplacementMap, #context, #root, replacementMap
+- Simple note: 74 lines total. Processes patterns, extracts groups with marks, converts to tokens, builds final regex with index and param replacement maps.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: SmartRouter module index file exposing the router class
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter
+- Simple note: 6 lines total. Simple index redirect to router.ts implementation.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: SmartRouter acts as router factory that selects optimal router per request
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, routers, routes, add, match, router, unsupported path, unsupportedPathError, Error, Fatal error, i, loop, activeRouter, get, name binding
+- Simple note: 70 lines total. Adds routes to temporary store, matches through router chain until success, then promotes that router as active.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: TrieRouter module index file exposing the router class
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter
+- Simple note: 6 lines total. Simple index redirect to router.ts implementation.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: TrieRouter uses tree-based search for exact path matching
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, Node, add, checkOptionalParameter, path, results, insert, search, method, path
+- Simple note: 28 lines total. Very concise tree insertion and search routing, no regex involved.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Trie routing node with method-based handler sets and pattern matching
+- Names noticed: Node, HandlerSet, handler, possibleKeys, score, HandlerParamsSet, params, emptyParams, #methods, children, insert, pushHandlerSets, search, parts, path, pattern, getPattern, splitPath, splitRoutingPath, key, wildcard, regexp, matcher, hasChildren, sort order, score
+- Simple note: 234 lines total. Queue-based tree traversal, multiple handler sets per node, patterns keyed by next-sibling, sorts by score for conflicts.
+
+## src/router/common.case.test.ts
+- Purpose: Shared test suite runner for all router implementations
+- Names noticed: runTest, skip, newRouter, Router, describe, match, GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, PATCH, method, path, route, handler, expect, beforeEach, task, suite, name, skip reason, test, handler, params, reserved words, wildcard, default, regExp, parameter, page, star, optional, routing order, Multi match, hierarchy, duplicate param, all, long prefix, including slashes, capture, capturing group, unknown method, non ascii, static, All, fallback
+- Simple note: 882 lines total. Common test cases for all routers including Basic Usage, Reserved words, Complex, Star, Optional, All, Static, Multiple matches, Duplicate param, Capture Group patterns.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: PatternRouter-specific test cases
+- Names noticed: runTest, skip, newRouter, PatternRouter, describe, unsupported, path, trailing slash, Duplicate param name, self, throw, error
+- Simple note: 42 lines total. Minimal test runner, skips unsupported cases, tests trailing slash with regex patterns.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: LinearRouter-specific test cases with UnsupportedPathError skipping
+- Names noticed: runTest, newRouter, UnsupportedPathError, describe, skip, reason, multi match, params, trailing slash, star, parameter, skip, LinearRouter
+- Simple note: 69 lines total. Fewer test cases than pattern, skips regex patterns and complex multi-match scenarios.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: RegExpRouter-specific test cases covering all matching scenarios
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, runTest, unsupported, newRouter, Return value type, param, index, ParamStash, param Stash, unsupported path error, ambiguous, multiple handlers, parent, child, static dynamic, different regular expression, capture group, complex capturing group, RegExpRouter error
+- Simple note: 141 lines total. Tests return type, unsupported path scenarios including ambiguous routes and multiple handlers with different labels, captures groups with patterns and lookaheads.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: SmartRouter-specific test cases delegating to RegExp/Trie routers
+- Names noticed: runTest, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, SmartRouter, describe, routers, newRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter
+- Simple note: 13 lines total. Wraps common case test with RegExpRouter and TrieRouter combined, validates fallback behavior.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: TrieRouter-specific test cases testing tree-based routing
+- Names noticed: runTest, newRouter, TrieRouter, describe
+- Simple note: 8 lines total. Only runs common case test suite, minimal test definition.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
+- Purpose: TrieRouter node unit tests for search and insert behavior
+- Names noticed: Node, search, insert, Root, not defined, get, post, *, get all, *, hello, *, including, *, constructor, *, basic, entry, name, comment, id, comment_id, map, name, address, location, events, sort value, name path, multiple route, type, specialized, param prefix, foo, bar, part, wildcard, regexp, all, methods, special wildcard, default, multi match, fallback, page, same path, including slashes, REST API, username, posts, duplicate param, id, action, regular expression, capturing group, regexp, child, grandchild, parent, sort order, with named path, post, tail, with wildcard, with special wildcard, api, with tails, post, trailing slash, fallback, static, unknown method, unknown, same, routing order, with named parameters, slug, the same, parameter, post, comment, comment_id, post comment, comments, post comment entry, comment_id, fallback, name, method, initial handler, handler
+- Simple note: 816 lines total. Exhaustive node tests for all insertion orders, multi-match scenarios, duplicate params, sorting order, method handling, wildcard patterns, regex groups, special wildcard, trailing slash behavior, parameter persistence across requests.
+
+## Cross-File Checklist
+
+- pattern-router: src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+- linear-router: src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+- reg-exp-router: src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+- smart-router: src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+- trie-router: src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts
+
+## File Path Summary
+- src/hono.ts
+- src/hono-base.ts
+- src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+- src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+- src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+- src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+- src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+- src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+- src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+- src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+- src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+- src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+- src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+- src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+- src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+- src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+- src/router/trie-router/node.ts
+- src/router/common.case.test.ts
+- src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+- src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+- src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+- src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+- src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts
+- src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
+
+Only bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md was created.

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: routing-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md. This is a read/write endurance task, not a clever debugging task. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it does not exist. Then read every file in this exact list before writing the final document: src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts. The output file must be long but mechanically simp
